markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Deep-dive on Dani Hao's community-building experience and tactics.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Mutiny:** Built the "M2" community (2.3k members) from scratch, driving pipeline by focusing on a quarterly theme ("Second Lever" conversion) and using a "flywheel" model to source content from members.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [**Apollo:** Scaled the community to drive retention and expansion, proving its value with a 2-3x higher retention rate for members vs. non-members.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1930.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** The newly launched paid community (140+ members) is a core product, requiring a leader with a "figure it out" mindset to build it like a startup.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=2915.0)
  - [**Key Tactic:** Use creative campaigns (e.g., Mutiny's "March Madness," Apollo's "Template Contest") to activate users, gather insights, and generate content.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)

## Topics

### Mutiny: Building the "M2" Community

  - [**Context:** Built the "M2" (Modern Marketers) community from scratch to drive pipeline during a period of marketing budget cuts.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [**Strategy → "Second Lever" Theme:** Focused on improving conversion rates to generate pipeline without increasing top-of-funnel spend.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [**Structure → Flywheel Model:**](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
      - [**Acquisition:** Newsletter → Events → Slack Community (M2).](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
      - [**Content Loop:** Sourced insights from M2 threads → Head of Content used for newsletter/blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [**Engagement Loop:** Used newsletter to promote events → Drove M2 membership by offering a say in event planning.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [**Key Programs & Tactics:**](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
      - [**Virtual Conference ("Second Lever"):**](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
          - [**Goal:** Maximize reach within the Ideal Customer Profile (ICP).](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
          - [**Speaker Acquisition:** Used a CEO alias to send "personal favor" emails to CMOs from the VC network and ABM target accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
          - [**Nurture:** Hosted private executive dinners post-event to convert high-value prospects.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
      - [**Customer Activation ("March Madness"):**](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
          - [**Goal:** Increase customer activation, a key company metric.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)
          - [**Mechanism:** A bracket-style contest where customers submitted conversion plays using the product.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
          - [**Outcomes:** Generated social buzz (custom "player cards"), drove event attendance, and awarded a grand prize ($1k cash or conference trip).](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1845.0)
  - [**Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
      - [**Growth:** Net new community members.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
      - [**Engagement:** Weekly Active Members (WAM) / Total Members.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
      - [**Business Impact:** Net pipeline generated from community activities.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)

### Apollo: Scaling for Retention & Expansion

  - [**Context:** Scaled the community for a Product-Led Growth (PLG) company with a large free user base.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [**Business Metric:** Net Retention Rate (NRR) and expansion revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)
  - [**Proof of Value:** A quarterly cohort analysis showed community members were 2-3x more likely to retain and generated substantially more expansion revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1991.0)
  - [**Key Programs & Tactics:**](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
      - [**"Apollo Days" Template Contest:**](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=2551.0)
          - [**Goal:** Gather and share real-world AI prompt/workflow examples from power users.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=2560.0)
          - [**Mechanism:** Users submitted templates; the community voted on the most helpful.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=2598.0)
          - [**Outcome:** The contest led to a partnership with the Product/Eng team to build a 1-click "steal this playbook" feature directly into the product.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=2620.0)
      - [**Event Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=2077.0)
          - [**Customer-Run Events:** Enabled customers to host their own local events with a $2k budget and support.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=2113.0)
          - [**Conference Happy Hours:** Used as a new member acquisition channel at major industry events (e.g., HubSpot Inbound).](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=2145.0)
  - [**Cross-Functional Collaboration:**](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=2402.0)
      - [**Marketing:** Partnered with email and social teams to repurpose community content (e.g., "inbound horror stories" campaign).](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=2253.0)
      - [**Product:** Added "Join the Community" CTAs to knowledge base articles and product webinars.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)
      - [**Sales/CS:** Provided enablement materials to invite prospects and new customers to the community.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)

### GrowthX: A New Paid Community

  - [**Context:** The community is a core product, not a support channel. It launched this week and has already doubled its paying members from 70 to 140+.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [**Early Learnings:**](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=2914.0)
      - [**Accessibility:** Using common tools (ChatGPT, Perplexity) in workshops makes content tangible and accessible for members.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=3140.0)
      - [**Aspiration:** The community's value is currently driven by the caliber of its members, creating a strong aspirational draw.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=3225.0)
  - [**Key Challenges:**](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=3410.0)
      - [**Scaling Content:** Needs a model to partner with niche influencers, offloading content creation while leveraging their audience for growth.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=3410.0)
      - [**"Anchor Moment":** Lacks a central, recurring event (like a summit or exclusive retreat) to rally the community.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=3487.0)
      - [**Vibe Management:** Must balance accessibility with maintaining a high-quality, "in-the-weeds" professional atmosphere.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=3290.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason Gong:** Sync with the team and provide an update on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/3Ksd5jk2X35xiA5mQzxR-rvcw63FNqxH?tab=summary&timestamp=3737.0)
